title: Need autoboost help - copying end date of timeline to a date column
excerpt:
Using Autoboost and trying to set Due Date to the last date of the timeline when it changes. 
When Timeline changes, apply formula and set results to Due Date 
Formula = {task’s Timeline}#END 
it runs and says looks like…

posts.author: hrix (Heather Rix)
posts.cookedHtml:
Using Autoboost and trying to set Due Date to the last date of the timeline when it changes.

When Timeline changes, apply formula and set results to Due Date
Formula = {task’s Timeline}#END

it runs and says looks like something is wrong with the formula.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @hrix,

As this is a third-party app from our apps marketplace, I recommend reaching out to the developers of the app at apps@moveoboost.com
